title: Initialize Cargo workspace with all pinned dependencies
description:
Set up the Cargo workspace. Single binary crate named 'smallhold'. Add all dependencies from the spec with pinned major versions: axum, sqlx (sqlite feature, compile-time checked queries), activitypub-federation (LemmyNet), reqwest (rustls-tls feature, NOT openssl), serde_json, ammonia, pulldown-cmark, image, fast_image_resize, blurhash, argon2, tracing, tracing-subscriber, clap v4 (derive), tokio (full features), rsa or similar for keypair generation. Also: proptest for property-based tests, once_cell, uuid, rand, hex, base64.

Agent workflow: Spawn a subagent to research current crate versions and compatibility before writing Cargo.toml. Spawn a second subagent to verify each dep has no known RUSTSEC advisories.

Test discipline: cargo audit must pass clean. cargo hack check --feature-powerset must compile.

Defensive programming: Pin major versions. Use deny(unsafe_code) at crate level (exceptions: only in a dedicated ffi module if needed). Clippy config: deny warnings.
design: Single crate with module tree: db/, api/, federation/, cli/, media/, streaming/, core/. Edition 2021. rust-version = '1.75' minimum.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build --release succeeds; cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings passes; cargo audit reports no vulnerabilities; all spec-required crates present
